attributes.dangerouslySetInnerHTML: :root{color-scheme:dark;--bg-0: #080a11;--bg-1: #0d1019;--bg-2: #111624;--panel: #151b2a;--panel-soft: #101625;--border: #283149;--border-soft: #1e2638;--text-1: #f5f7ff;--text-2: #b6bfd5;--text-3: #8e98b2;--accent-1: #ff7a18;--accent-2: #ff2f6d;--accent-3: #7d55ff;--accent-4: #31c4ff;--shadow-lg: 0 28px 56px -38px rgba(0, 0, 0, .85);--shadow-sm: 0 12px 28px -22px rgba(0, 0, 0, .75)}html,body{margin:0;padding:0}body{min-height:100vh;color:var(--text-1);font-family:Space Grotesk,Avenir Next,Futura,sans-serif;background:radial-gradient(1200px 700px at -10% -15%,rgba(255,122,24,.3),transparent 58%),radial-gradient(1100px 740px at 110% -10%,rgba(255,47,109,.26),transparent 55%),radial-gradient(900px 640px at 50% 110%,rgba(125,85,255,.2),transparent 62%),linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg-0) 0%,var(--bg-1) 46%,var(--bg-2) 100%)}body:before{content:"";position:fixed;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.025) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.02) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:34px 34px;-webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(0,0,0,.5) 35%,transparent 90%);mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(0,0,0,.5) 35%,transparent 90%)}a{color:inherit}::selection{background:#ff2f6d59;color:#fff}*{box-sizing:border-box}
